warnings: CORRECTED framing (superseding an earlier mischaracterization of this page as a 'duplicate'): this house's BOQ actually consists of TWO PARALLEL 23-sheet cost-estimate documents -- one per foundation option, per the sheet_name field ('ฐานรากแผ่' spread-footing spanning source pages 67-78, and 'ฐานรากเสาเข็ม' pile-foundation spanning pages 79-90, confirmed via หน้า67_1_summary.json and หน้า79_1.json's title text). This sheet (21/23 of the pile-foundation variant) has IDENTICAL item text and quantities to หน้า77_1_electrical_fixtures_boq.json (21/23 of the spread-footing variant) because electrical fixture scope genuinely does not change based on foundation type -- only the foundation/structural cost sheets (e.g. sheets 1-8 or so) would be expected to differ numerically between the two variants. This is NOT a scanning/printing duplicate; it is the correct, expected parallel-document structure. One of 2 split sheets on this source page; sibling is _หน้า89_2_electrical_switch_outlet_boq.json.
